hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '(mise/config\.toml\.tmpl|run_onchange_02-install-tools\.sh\.tmpl|/install\.sh|functions/tools\.fish)$' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You edited a file that README.md documents (tool list, versions, install methods, or the tools Fish function). Consider whether README.md needs a matching refresh \u2014 e.g. the Tool Versions section, aqua/runtime counts, or install steps. README is human-facing; mise/config.toml.tmpl stays the source of truth for versions."}}' || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if README needs a refresh
